touches.ai_summary: 8-minute discovery call with Chris. Discussed current CS productivity challenges and manual processes slowing team down. Chris shared he's under pressure to show ROI quickly in new role.

questions_asked.question: What are your top 3 productivity bottlenecks right now?
questions_asked.answer: Manual data entry, lack of automation in renewal workflows, and difficulty tracking team activity across tools.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing Salesforce and Zendesk setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms that sync bidirectionally.

touches.ai_summary: 7-minute follow-up discovery call diving deeper into automation requirements and unlimited automation tier benefits. Chris expressed interest but concerned about getting buy-in without exec sponsor involved yet.

questions_asked.question: Who typically approves investments of this size at SolarAnalytics?
questions_asked.answer: Usually our CFO and CRO, but I'm still building those relationships since I'm only 3 months in.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Clari for our use case?
questions_asked.answer: We're typically 20-30% lower for CS-focused deployments since Clari is built more for sales teams.

next_steps: Amelia intro confirmed for next steps
Chris will consider how to engage exec sponsors

touches.ai_summary: 60-minute technical evaluation session with Amelia Harris. Deep dive into API capabilities, data model, integration architecture, and security requirements. Amelia thorough and detail-oriented, asked about enterprise features and scalability.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and can we customize it?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is 2 years, enterprise plans allow custom retention up to 7 years.

questions_asked.question: Do you support SSO and role-based access controls?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support SAML-based SSO and granular RBAC across all plans.

questions_asked.question: How does the unlimited automation tier work technically - are there any hidden limits?
questions_asked.answer: No hidden limits on automation rules or workflow executions. Only rate limits are API calls (10k/hour) which is well above typical usage.

objections: Amelia noted that Clari has more advanced forecasting features that might be needed as they scale
next_steps: Amelia will prepare technical evaluation summary for Chris
Schedule product demo for broader team

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute product demo with Chris walking through CS-specific workflows and automation capabilities. Chris engaged and took notes, particularly interested in renewal automation and activity tracking features.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation workflows or are they pre-built templates?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable with our workflow builder, plus we have 50+ pre-built templates to get started quickly.

questions_asked.question: Which features would deliver the fastest time-to-value for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Definitely the renewal workflow automation and the activity capture - those are our biggest pain points today.

next_steps: Chris will socialize internally with CS team

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute pricing call focused on discount request. Chris pushing hard for 30% discount to match perceived Clari offer and fit his available budget. Discussed coming down to $15,700 ACV (28.7% discount) as compromise.

questions_asked.question: Can you match $15,000 to make this an easy approval?
